contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 10
- Description: I am right now in SF. Mostly moving around between Pacific West Coast and Brazilian area.
  
  https://agroverse.shop/cacao-journeys/index.html
  
   Don’t usually come back to Singapore much 😊🙏
  
  I am aware that Indonesia produce their own cacao too. 
  
  Right now we are mainly focused on cacao. 
  
  Put more wood behind the arrow so that it can fly further. Might look into expanding into other SKUs but that is alot of infrastructure and distribution network investment cost. Not having much visibility into available funding sources that would fit the DNA of our DAO that is easily available
  
  Two ways I can think of that might be interesting in the medium term 
  
  - the farmers or producers funds the cargo and have it made available for distribution on a consignment basis in the USA. 
  
  - ⁠an investor funds it
  
  Our networks typical management fee for the distribution is 20% of profit margin. 
  
  You will need to also figure out the unit economics to sone form of financing for trees to be planted for each unit sold 
  
  Happy to chat once you have figured out the financing as well as the unit economics 😊🙏
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
